description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a combination of large, floor-to-ceiling windows and smaller rectangular windows. The exterior is primarily clad in brown brick, contrasted by white and gray structural elements, giving it a contemporary urban appearance. The building has two distinct sections, one of which forms an L-shape with an open courtyard or light well in the center. The windows are arranged in vertical strips and large panes, allowing for ample natural light. The main entryway is understated, with a single door set beneath a large window, and there are no visible porches or decorative columns. The overall structure suggests a spacious, multi-level urban residence with a focus on clean lines and open interior spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with brown brick walls, large vertical and horizontal windows, and an L-shaped layout featuring an open courtyard. The design emphasizes clean lines and ample natural light.
description_view_0: This view shows the main facade with tall vertical windows, a large horizontal window, and the main entry door beneath a prominent window.
description_view_1: This side highlights a long brick wall with a large horizontal window and a smaller window below, with fewer vertical elements.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the L-shaped layout, the open courtyard, and a mix of vertical windows and solid brick walls.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the secondary section with a large grid of windows facing the courtyard and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door beneath a large window, no porch or decorative elements
